fillHoles.name: Fill the holes in the wall
fillHoles.description: Cover each hole with a rectangle using the rectangle function.

fillHoles.name: Fill the holes
fillHoles.description: Cover each hole with a rectangle.

howToDrawBricks.question: How do I draw bricks?
howToDrawBricks.answer: Draw a rectangle that covers each holes. Check the instructions for information on the different inputs that the `rectangle` function expects.

holeSizes.question: What sizes are the holes?
holeSizes.answer: Hover over the canvas to measure each space. All numbers are divisible by 10.

holeSizesReally.question: No, really, what sizes are the holes?
holeSizesReally.answer: Each hole is 20 wide and 10 tall

rectangle.description: Draw a rectangle at position (left, top) with the given width and height
